quotes.text: The Lord's instruction that a priest should "take a wife" was later taught by Paul to include elders and bishops. (Titus 1:5-7.) Evidently the Lord has never required celibacy as a prerequisite to receiving the priesthood.
quotes.speaker: Daniel H. Ludlow
quotes.source: A Companion to Your Study of the Old Testament
quotes.attr: Daniel H. Ludlow, A Companion to Your Study of the Old Testament, 170
